properties.displayName: Enforce storage accounts minimum TLS version
properties.description: Configure a minimum TLS version for secure communication between the client application and the storage account. To minimize security risk, the recommended minimum TLS version is the latest released version, which is currently TLS 1.2.
nonComplianceMessages: Storage account's TLS configuration do not meet AA SCCF Benchmark control: Enforce storage accounts minimum TLS version. If you would like to seek an exception for this policy, please reference this guide. https://developer.aa.com/docs/default/component/gaas-policy_as_code
